function.name: encode_imeisv_request
function.signature: int encode_imeisv_request(ImeisvRequest *imeisvrequest, uint8_t iei, uint8_t *buffer, uint32_t len)

bug.description: race condition on shared data accessed from multiple threads without synchronization

prompt:
There is a race condition on shared data accessed from multiple threads without synchronization downstream of function encode_imeisv_request in the openair3/NAS/COMMON subsystem.
The function is located at openair3/NAS/COMMON/IES/ImeisvRequest.c:60.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
